title: What Shall I Render to the Lord

verses.text: What shall I render to the Lord for all his benefits to me? How shall my soul, by grace restored, give worthy thanks, O Lord, to thee? The Psalter, 1912
Salvation's cup of blessing now I take, and call upon God's name; before his saints I pay my vow and here my gratitude proclaim. The Psalter, 1912
His saints the Lord delights to save, Their death is precious in his sight, He has redeemed me from the grace, And in his service I delight. The Psalter, 1912
With thankful heart I offer now my gift, and call upon God's name; before his saints I pay my vow and here my gratitude proclaim. The Psalter, 1912
Within his house, the house of prayer, I dedicate myself to God; let all his saints his grace declare and join to sound his praise abroad. The Psalter, 1912
